name: AnatAll
label: AnatAll
code:
MULTICMD
TMP=$(mktemp /tmp/mgl.XXXXXX); TMP="$TMP.py"; printf 'import gl\ngl.windowposition(0,0,1400,1000)\ngl.loadimage("{subjects_dir}/{fsrecon_dir}/mri/orig/001.mgz")\ngl.overlayload("{subjects_dir}/{fsrecon_dir}/mri/mask.nii.gz")\ngl.opacity(1,30)\n' > "$TMP"; ${mricrogl_dir} "$TMP"; rm -f "$TMP"
;|
freeview --layout 4 --viewsize 400 300 \
  -viewport axial \
  -v ${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/mri/orig/001.mgz:opacity=1:grayscale=0,2000 \
   {subjects_dir}/{fsrecon_dir}/mri/mask.nii.gz:colormap=jet:opacity=0.3 \
  -zoom 1.3 \
  -f ${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/surf/lh.pial:edgecolor=overlay:annot=${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/label/lh.aparc.annot \
     ${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/surf/rh.pial:edgecolor=overlay:annot=${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/label/rh.aparc.annot \
     ${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/surf/lh.white:edgecolor=red:annot=${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/label/lh.aparc.annot \
     ${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/surf/rh.white:edgecolor=red:annot=${subjects_dir}/${fsrecon_dir}/label/rh.aparc.annot \
  --hide-3d-slices
